generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how vital our alliances are for national security. While some argue we should go it alone, the reality is that our partners share the burden - and the risks. Remember the 2024 cyber attacks? Coordinated alliance defenses stopped them cold. We can't afford to weaken these critical partnerships. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
